name: Hugging Face
description: Hugging Face Inference API provides serverless access to thousands of open-source AI models. It supports chat completion, text generation, image generation, embeddings, text classification, zero-shot classification, summarization, translation, question answering, audio transcription, image classification, and object detection through an OpenAI-compatible interface.

capabilities.name: chat_completion_create
capabilities.description: Generate conversational AI responses using any supported open-source language model. OpenAI-compatible endpoint with automatic provider selection.

capabilities.name: text_generate
capabilities.description: Generate text continuations from a prompt using open-source language models.

capabilities.name: image_generate
capabilities.description: Generate images from text prompts using diffusion models like FLUX and Stable Diffusion.

capabilities.name: embedding_create
capabilities.description: Generate vector embeddings from text inputs using feature extraction models for semantic search and retrieval.

capabilities.name: text_classify
capabilities.description: Classify text into categories using zero-shot or fine-tuned classification models.

capabilities.name: audio_transcribe
capabilities.description: Convert speech audio files to text using automatic speech recognition models like Whisper.

capabilities.name: text_summarize
capabilities.description: Generate a shorter summary of a text document while preserving key information.

capabilities.name: text_translate
capabilities.description: Translate text from one language to another using translation models.

capabilities.name: question_answer
capabilities.description: Extract answers from a given context text based on a question.

capabilities.name: image_classify
capabilities.description: Classify images into categories using image classification models.

capabilities.name: object_detect
capabilities.description: Detect and locate objects within images using object detection models.
